title: bidens bidentoides var. typica
intro: Bidens bidentoides var. typica, also known as tickseed coreopsis, is a perennial herb belonging to the aster family. Traditionally, this plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with Bidens bidentoides var. typica include reducing fever, alleviating digestive problems, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
